question.text: In the CDSL system, what information is compulsory when creating NDU/Lien/encumbrance?

answer.text: PAN of the Ultimate Lender and the encumbrance reason
Only the ISIN of the securities

explanation.text: **The Logic:** In CDSL system, PAN of the Ultimate Lender is required to be mentioned on the form. Also the NDU/Lien/encumbrance reason is compulsory. **The Trap:** While ISIN and value are part of the transaction, the specifically mandated compulsory fields are PAN of Ultimate Lender and encumbrance reason. **Cross-Exam Context:** KYC and identification requirements are tested across all NISM certifications. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Always capture the PAN of the ultimate lender — this ensures transparency in encumbrance records and regulatory compliance.
